description_long: This is a modern, rectangular cabinet with a striking two-tone color scheme, featuring a deep navy blue body and a mustard yellow front panel. The front face is adorned with subtle vertical grooves and a circular design at the center, suggesting the presence of two doors that open outward. The cabinet stands on sturdy, open-frame metal legs, which are also finished in navy blue, giving it a contemporary and slightly industrial look. The top surface is flat and smooth, suitable for placing decorative items or everyday objects. The overall construction appears to be primarily wood or engineered wood, with metal supports for stability. This piece would fit well in urban environments such as lobbies, offices, or modern residential spaces.
description: A modern, rectangular cabinet with a navy blue body, mustard yellow grooved front doors, and open-frame metal legs. The design is sleek and contemporary, suitable for urban interiors.
description_view_0: Front view showing the mustard yellow grooved doors with a central circular design and navy blue top and legs.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the solid navy blue side panel and the open-frame metal leg structure.
description_view_2: Rear view revealing a plain navy blue back panel with no visible openings or features.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the navy blue side and a hint of the yellow front edge.
